data.processing_time: Minimum 4 days in advance of the date of arrival. Can be made 120 days in advance from proposed date of travel (for e-Tourist Visa (01 year / 05 years), e-Business Visa, e-Medical, e-Medical Attendant and e-Conference visa). Minimum 4 days in advance of the date of arrival. Can be made 30 days in advance from proposed date of travel (for e-Tourist Visa (30 days)).

essential_apps.description: Official Aadhaar app for accessing Aadhaar details, downloading e-Aadhaar, and managing biometrics.
Platform for booking COVID-19 vaccination appointments and downloading certificates.
Essential for navigation, public transport, and exploring cities in India.
